---
title: "Books"
description-meta: "Books"
title-block-banner: false
page-layout: full
css: custom.css
listing:
  - id: books-list
    contents: books.yml
    template: book_card.ejs
    sort: false
    categories: true
---

<p class="text-muted" style="font-family:'Inter',sans-serif; font-size:0.9rem; margin-top:-0.5rem; margin-bottom:2rem;">Hover over any item to read a brief description and access the full text.
</p>

:::{#books-list}
:::
